desc: In the real dset deep-property-setter library (src/index.js), an off-by-one in the terminal-key check writes the value one level too shallow: dset(o, 'a.b.c', 5) produces { a: { b: 5 } } instead of { a: { b: { c: 5 } } }. Fix the single index comparison that decides when the final key is reached so that tests/dset.test.ts passes.
